parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While on, the receives information from the input. While off, no processing occurs. Existing blobs will remain.

parameters.name: searchmode
parameters.label: Search Mode
parameters.description: Controls how searching for blobs is done across all the points.

parameters.name: maxblobs
parameters.label: Max Blobs
parameters.description: The maximum number of blobs that can be tracked.

parameters.name: maxpointdistance
parameters.label: Max Point Distance in Blob
parameters.description: Two measured points from the input are considered to be part of the same blob if they are this distance or closer to each other.

parameters.name: maxblobmovement
parameters.label: Max Blob Movement
parameters.description: This controls the maximum distance a blob can move between successive frames and still be considered the same 'blob'.

parameters.name: areaofinterest
parameters.label: Area of Interest
parameters.description: Limits the area in which blobs are tracked. Points outside the area of interest are ignored.

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the area of interest.

parameters.name: allowmovementoutside
parameters.label: Allow Movement Outside Area
parameters.description: When this is on, blobs detected within the Area of Interest can move outside of that area and still be tracked. When this is off blobs that move outside the area of interest will stop being tracked.

parameters.name: outputcentroid
parameters.label: Output Centroid
parameters.description: Include the centroid of detected blobs as part of the output channels.

parameters.name: outputvelocity
parameters.label: Output Velocity
parameters.description: Include the velocity of detected blobs as part of the output channels.

parameters.name: minblobpoints
parameters.label: Min Points per Blob
parameters.description: Minimum number of points that must be near each other to form a blob. Use to help filter out false positives.

parameters.name: blobinittime
parameters.label: Blob Init Time (s)
parameters.description: Amount of time a blob must be detected to be considered trustworthy. Use to help filter out false positives. A blob will only be output if it's been detected for at least time amount of time.

parameters.name: lostblobtimeout
parameters.label: Lost Blob Timeout (s)
parameters.description: The amount of time before a blob that has been lost is removed from the output.

parameters.name: predicttype
parameters.label: Blob Movement Prediction Type
parameters.description: With prediction enabled, blobs from the last frame have their new position predicted before being matched to the current frame.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: sizey
parameters.label: Sizey
parameters.description: The size of the area of interest.

parameters.name: centery
parameters.label: Centery
parameters.description: The center of the area of interest.
